first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is fundamentally the same in both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strong software background but note the critical lack of hardware-specific experience (SoC, IP modeling, AI accelerators) required for the role. The minor differences in wording and framing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest any bias related to the name change.
